sql.issuance_by_month_type: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', c.issued)::date AS issued_month, c.type AS card_type, COUNT(c.card_id) AS issued_cards FROM card c GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.issued_card_mix: SELECT c.type AS card_type, COUNT(c.card_id) AS issued_cards FROM card c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY issued_cards DESC;
sql.card_withdrawals_1997: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS card_withdrawal_count FROM trans t WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1998-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

charts.layout_intent: monthly issuance trend by card type
monthly withdrawal trend aligned with issuance convention

chart_spec.layout_intent: two trends stacked vertically with type mix as a side panel
